subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! Thou beholdest my feebleness, my abasement, my meekness, my distress, my disquiet, and my perturbation in my separation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی تری عجزی و انکساری و تذللی و اضطراری و قلقی و اضطرابی فی هجرانی عن
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @prayer for nearness to God, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @The Holy Spirit
